build_recipe:
STEP 1: Create base plate — cq.Workplane("XY").box(50, 50, 12)

STEP 2: Cut center bore — .faces(">Z").workplane().circle(10).cutThruAll()

STEP 3: Add raised feature — .workplane(offset=12).rect(40, 40).extrude(2)

STEP 4: Create bolt circle — .workplane("XY").centered(25, 25).circle(18).extrude(1.5)

STEP 5: Add bolt holes — .faces(">Z").workplane().points([(15, 15), (35, 15), (25, 35)]).circle(4).cutThruAll()
